last_item: Band E (cleanup) — FINAL consistency sweep -> COMPLETE. Comprehensive grep audit across src/views + src/components confirmed ZERO hand-rolled equivalents survive: every empty->Empty (EmptyState), status->Badge, callout->Alert (Callout/ErrorNotice/StaleBanner), loader->shadcn primitive (Spinner labeled/indeterminate; Skeleton for Dashboard shape-preview; no animate-pulse divs). No raw <button>/<select>/<input>/<textarea>/<table>/<hr> in views (one <button> hit is a test fixture), no raw colors, no manual z-index, no space-x/y-*. Modal/ConfirmDialog are LIVE thin shadcn Dialog/AlertDialog wrappers (4 callsites each), not orphans; Toast.tsx deleted (->sonner). styles.css = shadcn token infra + minimal globals (162 lines). NO SOURCE CHANGE this iteration -- the migration was already complete; build emitted byte-identical dist; this iteration is the verification + sign-off. Wrote COMPLETE.md. ALL Goal conditions in PROMPT.md hold: (1) shadcn initialised (components.json + Tailwind v4 + 28 ui components), (2) all 10 views rebuilt, (3) hand-rolled components replaced (ui.tsx=shadcn compositions, Modal->Dialog, ConfirmDialog->AlertDialog, Toast->sonner, Layout->Sidebar), (4) legacy design-token CSS removed, (5) gates green. THE SHADCN UI/UX REBUILD IS DONE. _superseded_last_item: Band E (cleanup): migrate the global body/code/a element rules onto shadcn semantic tokens, then delete the now-freed legacy vars (--bg/--surface-2/--text/--mono/--sans). This was the LAST legacy-var consumer (backlog line-47, the dark-coupling that previously blocked it is already gone). Edits in styles.css: (1) body -- dropped `font-family:var(--sans)` + `color:var(--text)` + `background:var(--bg)`; kept the non-token base typography (font-size:14px, line-height:1.5, -webkit-font-smoothing). The existing @layer base `body{@apply bg-background text-foreground}` + `html{@apply font-sans}` now take over. CASCADE KEY: the UNLAYERED body rule was overriding those layered rules (unlayered beats @layer), so removing the token props is exactly what lets the shadcn baseline apply. (2) a -- `color:var(--primary)` -> `@apply text-primary`. (3) code -- `font-family:var(--mono)` + `background:var(--surface-2)` -> `@apply bg-muted font-mono` (kept literal font-size/padding/border-radius). Then deleted the 5 freed :root vars (grep-proven zero refs outside the 5 edited lines). DELIBERATE VISIBLE CHANGE (flagged, endorsed by backlog author): page bg gray #f6f7f9 -> white (--background), app font system-ui -> Geist Variable -- BOTH are the shadcn baseline the scaffold already imported (@fontsource-variable/geist) + set on html (font-sans) + --background:white, but which the legacy unlayered body rule had been shadowing the whole time. White bg + bordered shadcn cards + Geist is the coherent shadcn-default admin look. code/text-color deltas negligible (muted oklch(0.97) ~= old surface-2 #f1f3f6; foreground oklch(0.145) ~= old text #1c2530). Also reworded the :root comment to drop the `*` glob chars that tripped a harmless lightningcss optimize warning (Unexpected token Delim('*') -- it was mis-scanning the comment); pre-existing pattern, now clean. PURE semantic-token swap -- no view markup/state/affordance/component change -> ui-heuristics-reviewer N/A (same precedent as the dark-mode + next-themes prunes; there is no view to review, only global CSS tokens); self-checked against UI-RULES 'semantic tokens only' -- now using bg-background/text-foreground/font-sans/bg-muted/font-mono/text-primary everywhere. 130 web tests green; typecheck/build/go build (outside sandbox) green. Tracked diff = styles.css + regenerated embedded internal/server/web/dist (staged via git add). NOTE: a stray untracked web/web/.npm-cache dir was created by running with a relative NPM_CONFIG_CACHE while cwd=web/; it is untracked sandbox cruft (ralph.sh uses an absolute NPM_CONFIG_CACHE so this won't recur) and tree_is_clean() only checks TRACKED files, so it's harmless and left in place per the 'don't delete untracked sandbox dotfiles' rule. NEXT: band-E consistency sweep (every empty->Empty, loader->Skeleton, status->Badge, callout->Alert; no orphaned components) -- if clean, write COMPLETE.md.
_prev_item_darkmode: Band E (cleanup): remove the non-functional dark-mode CSS -> the panel is now light-only. Removed TWO blocks from web/src/styles.css: (1) the legacy @media(prefers-color-scheme:dark) overrides (only re-coloured legacy vars --bg/--surface-2/--text/--border/--primary/--ok*/--warn*/--info* -- the shadcn semantic tokens --background/--card/--muted/... got NO dark values, so system-dark users saw an INCOHERENT partial-dark: dark body+chrome behind LIGHT shadcn cards); and (2) the .dark {} shadcn dark token block, which is DEAD CODE -- grep-verified .dark is never applied anywhere (no classList/ThemeProvider/documentElement/"dark" class in any view, ui component, main.tsx, App.tsx, or index.html; the only 'dark' hits are inert dark: utility variants in 13 ui components). KEPT @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *)) so those dark: utilities stay class-scoped + inert -- removing it would let Tailwind's DEFAULT dark variant fire on prefers-color-scheme and re-introduce the incoherence. Pinned sonner theme 'system'->'light' (sonner.tsx) so toasts match the light-only app (its --normal-* vars already track shadcn tokens). Visual impact: LIGHT-mode users see ZERO change (neither removed block ever affected them); system-dark users go from broken mixed-dark to clean light -- a FIX, not a regression. No theme toggle exists/existed -> no working feature dropped; real dark mode (full shadcn dark palette + a toggle) is a NEW feature, out of scope for this UI-parity loop. No view/markup/affordance change -> ui-heuristics-reviewer N/A (same precedent as the next-themes prune). This UNBLOCKS line-47: migrating global body/code/a element rules onto semantic tokens to free --bg/--surface-2/--text/--mono/--sans is now trivially safe (no dark coupling left to preserve). 130 web tests green; typecheck/build/go build (outside sandbox) green. Tracked diff = styles.css (-48 net) + sonner.tsx + regenerated embedded internal/server/web/dist. NEXT: line-47 migrate global body/code/a rules onto semantic tokens then prune freed legacy vars; then consistency sweep -> COMPLETE.md. DROP line-54 (--info-soft distinctness): its premise is stale -- --primary-soft no longer exists, so info-soft no longer collides with any primary-soft surface.
_prev_item_next_themes: Band E (cleanup): prune the orphaned next-themes dependency. npm uninstall next-themes --offline (no network needed -- pure removal, completed in-sandbox via NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=web/.npm-cache) dropped next-themes (^0.4.6) from web/package.json + package-lock.json (-11 lines). Confirmed orphan before removing: only a COMMENT in src/components/ui/sonner.tsx mentions it (explaining this SPA themes via prefers-color-scheme, no ThemeProvider) -- not imported anywhere; and sonner does not peer-require it (grep of node_modules/sonner/package.json clean). Pure dependency-manifest prune: NO view/component/markup/rendered-output change, so the ui-heuristics-reviewer pass was N/A (skipped -- nothing rendered changed; verification = four green gates + the orphan-proof greps). Embedded internal/server/web/dist rebuilt BYTE-IDENTICAL (next-themes was never bundled). 130 web tests green; typecheck/build/go build (outside sandbox) green. Tracked diff = package.json + package-lock.json only. NEXT open E items: migrate global body/code/a element rules onto semantic tokens to free --bg/--text/--surface-2/--mono/--sans (CAREFUL -- coupled to the legacy @media(prefers-color-scheme:dark) block, which is currently the app's ONLY firing dark-mode path since the shadcn .dark class is never toggled by any ThemeProvider; so removing it is a deliberate visual/parity change, NOT mechanical); then consistency sweep + --info-soft distinctness (NOTE: --primary-soft no longer exists, so that finding's premise must be re-confirmed against current Migrate step-active markup) -> COMPLETE.md.
_prev_item_var_prune: Band E (cleanup): prune unreferenced legacy design-token VARS from styles.css (first slice of the 'delete design-token vars' item, unblocked now that all legacy class rules + classNames are gone). Removed ONLY :root + @media(prefers-color-scheme:dark) legacy vars proven (grep) to have ZERO var() and zero plain-string refs anywhere in src/: --surface, --border-strong, --text-muted, --primary-hover, --primary-soft, --danger/-hover/-soft, --shadow, and the dead :root --radius-sm:6px (the @theme inline --radius-sm:calc(var(--radius)*0.6) already overrode it to the identical 6px). KEPT the still-referenced legacy vars: --bg/--text/--surface-2/--mono/--sans (global body/code/a element rules) + --border/--primary/--warn*/--ok*/--info* (consumed by @theme inline -> shadcn --color-*). No semantic shadcn tokens touched. Pure dead-CSS deletion: no view markup/class/rendered-output change (removed vars now have zero occurrences; every kept var still has a live ref). 130 web tests green; typecheck/build/go build (outside sandbox) green. NEXT E sub-slices: migrate global body/code/a element rules onto semantic tokens to free --bg/--text/--surface-2/--mono/--sans (CAREFUL: legacy unlayered body rule sets bg=var(--bg)#f6f7f9 + color=var(--text), which currently WINS over @layer base body's bg-background/text-foreground -- so swapping changes body bg gray->white; that's a visual change, do it deliberately/with parity intent), then consistency sweep + next-themes prune + --info-soft distinctness -> COMPLETE.md.
_prev_last_item_slice6: Band E (cleanup), slice 6: the ACTUAL last legacy className -> Tailwind + dead legacy class CSS purged. Slice 5 wrongly claimed the last className was cleared; a grep-audit found the `.view` page-wrapper class still used by all 8 views. (1) Migrated all 8 views' root <div className=view> -> `mx-auto flex max-w-[1100px] flex-col gap-5` -- a 1:1 equivalence of the old .view rule (max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:20px; gap-5 = 20px). Dashboard's role=status loading wrapper swapped too. (2) Deleted ALL now-dead legacy *class* rules from styles.css: .muted/.small/.mono, .view, .btn*/.icon-btn, the whole .data-table*/.table-scroll/.col-*/.row-num/.cell-null table block, the .field*/.checkbox/fieldset.field form block, the dead Modal comment, and the .field-row responsive media query -- replaced with a one-line note. KEPT the :root design-token vars + global element styles (code/body/h1-h4/a/*) + @theme inline + .dark + @layer base. Grep-proven dead before deleting (remaining btn/field/checkbox/etc hits were all shadcn import paths, [role=checkbox] selectors, or prose -- .view was the only real consumer). ui-heuristics-reviewer: confirmed exact CSS equivalence + no layout regression (verified Layout <main> still lets mx-auto center). 130 web tests green; typecheck/build/go build green. Now GENUINELY zero legacy className strings anywhere outside styles.css -- E1 token-VAR prune fully unblocked. Next: prune the truly-unreferenced :root vars (--bg/--surface*/--text*/--danger*/--primary-hover/--primary-soft/--border-strong/--shadow) but KEEP --ok*/--warn*/--info* (consumed by @theme inline --color-success/warning/info) and --mono/--sans/--surface-2/--text/--bg (still used by global code/body rules -- migrate those element rules to semantic tokens first, OR prune only the unreferenced vars). Then E2 consistency sweep + E3 next-themes + E4 info-soft token + COMPLETE.md.
_dropped_item_slice4: Band E (cleanup), slice 4: shared ui.tsx PageHeader({title,description,actions}) divs -> Tailwind tokens. .page-header -> flex items-start justify-between gap-4; .page-desc -> mt-1 max-w-[60ch] text-muted-foreground; .page-actions -> flex shrink-0 flex-wrap justify-end gap-2; h1 -> text-2xl font-semibold text-foreground. Public API unchanged, all 6 call-sites untouched. Deleted dead .page-* CSS (standalone .btn-row kept). Reviewer one finding applied. Added PageHeader test. 130 web tests green.
_dropped_item_slice3: Band E (cleanup), slice 3: shared ui.tsx SecretValue reveal/copy -> shadcn Button. SecretValue({label,value}) (shown once after creating a role/database in RolesDatabases) was the last shared component using hand-rolled <button className='btn btn-sm'>. Reveal/Hide + Copy -> Button variant=outline size=sm (established secondary-action pattern). Masked <code> block + .secret-* wrapper divs -> Tailwind semantic tokens (flex flex-col gap-1; bg-muted border rounded-md font-mono text-xs px-2.5 py-2 overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap; .secret-label -> text-sm font-medium). Public API unchanged, single call-site (RolesDatabases) untouched. Deleted dead .btn-sm + .secret-label/.secret-row/.secret-value CSS from styles.css. ui-heuristics-reviewer: one blocking finding applied -- aria-pressed={revealed} on the Reveal/Hide toggle (shadcn Button renders plain <button> and won't inject pressed state; trivially-additive a11y win); low-severity copy-error note declined (pre-existing/out-of-scope per parity). Added SecretValue test (mask->reveal toggle + aria-pressed false/true + Reveal/Copy data-variant=outline). 127 web tests green (+2); typecheck/build/go build green. Remaining legacy-class holders before E-token-delete: PageHeader->Tailwind (.page-header/.page-desc/.page-actions), App.boot-screen, Settings.callout-detail/-hint.
_prev_item: Band D (Migrate): Migrate → shadcn. Rebuilt src/views/Migrate.tsx. Mode selector (.mode-tabs/ModeTab custom buttons) → shadcn Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent — FIRST Tabs use in the app; TabsContent preserves the old `{mode===...}` unmount-on-switch (per-mode form state still resets). Receive/Send (.segmented/.seg) → a nested Tabs in SessionPanel. SourceFields <fieldset> → FieldSet/FieldLegend/FieldGroup/Field/FieldLabel/FieldDescription+Input (two-input .field-rows → responsive grid sm:grid-cols-[2fr_1fr] / sm:grid-cols-2; ids static — only one SourceFields mounts at a time under Tabs). All forms: .field/.checkbox/.inline-form → Field/Checkbox + flex flex-col gap-5; overwrite checkboxes → Field orientation=horizontal+Checkbox; typed-confirm inputs (target name / OVERWRITE) → Field+Input+FieldError on mismatch + aria-describedby (gate logic unchanged). .btn* → Button (submit=default self-start; Start-another=outline sm; session Cancel=ghost sm + text-destructive; modal footers outline/destructive; busy composes the raw Spinner via data-icon). History + verification-diff .data-table → Table family. .session-code-block/.session-code → Tailwind tokens (bg-muted, font-mono text-4xl tracking-[0.18em] text-primary); progress stepper (.progress-step/.step-*, NO shadcn equivalent) kept as custom markup but rebuilt on semantic tokens via cn() (done=border-success, active=bg-primary/10, failed=border-destructive, pending=opacity-60; dropped the decorative pulse keyframe). .muted/.small/.job-running → text-muted-foreground/text-sm/flex flex-col. Dead Migrate-only CSS removed (.mode-tab*/.session-code*/.progress-steps/.progress-step/.step-*/.source-fields/.segmented/.seg/.job-running/.inline-form/@keyframes pulse); kept shared .field-row/.field-narrow/.field-help/.checkbox/.data-table (Alerts/Settings/Pooler/etc still use them — band E).
last_result: green: typecheck, 130 web tests (17 files), build, go build (outside sandbox via dangerouslyDisableSandbox; snap-confine cap_dac_override blocks go in-sandbox). FINAL consistency-sweep iteration: grep audit proved zero hand-rolled equivalents survive; wrote COMPLETE.md. No source change (build emitted byte-identical dist). Tracked diff = scripts/ralph/{COMPLETE.md,progress-current.md,state.json} only. THE SHADCN UI/UX REBUILD IS COMPLETE -- all Goal conditions in PROMPT.md hold. Loop should stop.
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
